steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create task/t0036 branch and worktree from main.

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0022 and t0030 dependencies completed.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: t0027 + t0030 already cover Schachter2010 and passive-filtering predictions.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: no new external info required.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Inherit t0030 workflow; identify null-GABA constant in t0022 driver and override to 6 nS.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design the halved-null-GABA override, diameter-sweep driver, null-Hz diagnostic plot.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Copy t0030 code, override null-GABA to 6 nS, run 840-trial sweep, analyse primary+vector-sum DSI + null-Hz diagnostic, classify slope.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Interpret halved-GABA result in context of t0030 null baseline and t0035 flat-on-t0024 result.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary, results_detailed with null-Hz-vs-diameter diagnostic, Examples, Task Requirement Coverage.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Compare DSI-vs-diameter slope to Schachter2010 + passive-filtering + t0030 null baseline + t0035 flat-on-t0024.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Write suggestions.json with follow-up experiments motivated by the halved-GABA result.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run verificators, capture sessions, finalise task.json, prepare PR, merge, overview refresh.
